description: Use the test_driven optimizer to improve the complaint-generator graph analysis phase. Target files: complaint_phases/denoiser.py. Phase goal: Improve knowledge-graph and dependency-graph population so denoising and legal reasoning operate on structured facts instead of raw narrative alone. Recommended actions: Improve denoiser gap selection and answer processing so each turn closes a concrete knowledge-graph gap instead of only restating the narrative.; Make answer processing update entities, relationships, and satisfied requirements deterministically when the complainant supplies the missing field.; Promote exact dates, staff names/titles, hearing-request timing, response dates, and causation sequencing into graph updates before broadening the next question set.. Weak complaint types to generalize for: housing_discrimination, hacc_research_engine. Weak evidence modalities to improve: policy_document, file_evidence. Graph evidence targets: adverse_action, context_or_reason, denial_event. Graph focus areas: claim_elements. Focus only on complaint_phases/denoiser.py. Target symbols: process_answer.
